inputs.label: Face Value
inputs.businessContext: Par value of the bond paid at maturity

businessContext_i18n.en: Par value of the bond paid at maturity
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennwert der Anleihe, der bei Fälligkeit gezahlt wird

inputs.label: Coupon Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual coupon payment as a percentage of face value

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual coupon payment as a percentage of face value
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominal değerin yüzdesi olarak yıllık kupon ödemesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Kuponzahlung als Prozentsatz des Nennwerts

inputs.label: Market Interest Rate (YTM)
inputs.businessContext: Yield to maturity required by investors

businessContext_i18n.en: Yield to maturity required by investors
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımcılar tarafından talep edilen vadeye kadar getiri
businessContext_i18n.de: Von Anlegern geforderte Rendite bis Fälligkeit
Zeit bis zur Fälligkeit der Anleihe

inputs.label: Coupon Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of coupon payments per year (e.g., 2 for semi-annual)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of coupon payments per year (e.g., 2 for semi-annual)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık kupon ödemesi sayısı (örn. altı aylık için 2)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Kuponzahlungen pro Jahr (z. B. 2 für halbjährlich)

formulas.bondPrice: discountRate === 0 ? faceValue + couponPayment * totalPeriods : pvCoupons + pvFace

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
